item.title: Welp, looks like I'm getting a lump of coal. AGAIN.
item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: Backlogged memes: millennials
item.description:
Danger. But like the fun kind. Hello all, I have been way too morning sick and depressed to talk to anyone.
Not that anyone notices or cares when that happens. Gotta be entertaining or people forget about you right? I watched all of bojack horseman in like 3 days which is probably not good for your psyche but I figured hey I’m already sad. I think it actually helped but by god is it cynical.
I don’t know why more women don’t try this, it’s so freeing. My skin and hair did not suffer in the slightest when I switched to my boyfriend’s beauty regimen (such as it is) ages ago and I do not regret a thing.
I miss Taco Bell…
I’m the kind of bisexual that’s every other sexual, not twice a sexual.
Figured some of you would appreciate this
What else are you supposed to do honestly, it’s not like there’s a group to join that actually does things
Yeah pretty much. I hate people.
All true, why do we do this to ourselves
Pretty sure this is why 90% of the guys that liked me liked me and literally no other reason
I do love kids explaining things badly. It’s adorable.
Are millennials coming out of their cage and doing just fine? Because they’re Killers
I want this so bad.
Because “slavery” wasn’t catchy enough I guess
Why??? What is there to hate about science??? It just IS
Proud to be on the judgy side for once. Staying in the U.S. made me feel…complicit. There was awhile there when people were hating on anyone talking about moving to Canada if trump wins instead of staying to fight to make it better. No. Shut up. I’ll come back when you people actually start throwing Molotovs. Next argument.
There’s not any science to not support it!
To be fair only chase is a class traitor, being a cop. It’s my only issue with the show. That and having two recycling dogs when you don’t really even need one, but whatever. Kiddo got really into it so I tried to use it as bribery to potty train but he called my bluff so now he has no screen time at all. I am somehow both winning and losing.
It was.
The cleavage version, yw.
Everyone rn
Or by myself. This is not about you, stay focused
Why is this mannequin so attractive. Science needs to explain this.
The thought is very American. The execution is a horrifying nightmare that America would never touch. Kinda like German pizza.
I support her
Hope this helps someone because I have been too down
Finally, my deaf ass feels heard
Do not know if this is real or fake, dolphins suck that hard.
God is operating on levels the average novelist couldn’t comprehend. This is some bojack shit though seriously
We know, but hey!
The French are probably the most confused about why Americans are just not doing anything. They know what’s up you guys. You should see their lives they’re so happy.
I hate how this sounds in my head
Found this out when I lost a bunch of weight, it’s a trap
One of those memes that teach you something way faster and better than school
Crypto guys especially
Don’t look up vitamin d deficiencies whatever you do
Well let me try the shrooms first just to see for myself
Mine!
My cat has a Xanax scrip and he’s much happier when he’s on it but still he refuses. Fuzzy idiot.
Yeah no shut
I’m extremely blocked and my publisher is simultaneously breathing down my neck and refusing to help. And then to top it ALL off today the dentist DRILLED A FILLING WITHOUT WARNING OR ANESTHETIC IN FRONT OF MY CHILD after judging the state of my teeth. I don’t even know what to do with that???? That feels like something I should complain to someone about?? I came out of there sobbing and I basically haven’t stopped. But who caressssss, as long as I write my silly little books then a very small audience cares if I live or die and I’m lucky for even that much I am so sick of end stage capitalism and just how little energy we have to fucking care about anything
That’s my time, see you folks

item.dc:creator: MayMyEnemiesLiveLong

item.title: Jamestown Cannibalism Victim
item.description: In 2012, archaeologists made a harrowing discovery at Jamestown, the site of the first permanent English settlement in the United States. Unearthed among butchered animal bones and food scraps was the skull of a 14-year-old girl, now known as "Jane." Her remains, including a leg bone, were found in a trash pit alongside bones from horses and dogs, evidence of the desperate measures colonists resorted to during the brutal "Starving Time" of 1609-1610. That winter saw the colony’s population of 300 reduced to just 60 by spring. Forensic analysis by Douglas Owsley revealed chilling details. Jane's skull bore multiple cuts and blows from at least three sharp metal tools, clear indications of an effort to remove soft tissue and brain matter. These findings represent the first definitive forensic evidence of survival cannibalism in an early European colony in North America. This grim chapter of history underscores the unimaginable hardships faced by the settlers as they struggled to survive, and it casts a stark light on the human cost of early colonial ventures.

item.title: Some Old Photos
item.description:
48 cars in a elevator parking garage in Downtown Chicago - 1936
Suited up for a mid day stroll, 1915.
U.S. Sgt. Frank Shiborski eats a turkey leg on Thanksgiving in Italy, 1944.
Two women working as ice deliverers carry a large block of ice. September 1918.
After realizing that poor women were using the flour sacks to make clothing for their children some flour mills started using flowered fabric for their sacks, 1939.
Future president Theodore Roosevelt in his hunting gear, 1885.
A Ford Model A Pick Up waits for a train to pass at a railroad crossing, 1930.
Women Drinking Coffee In A Terrace Of A Cafe, Paris, 1925.

item.title: Fun Fact
item.description:
This guy (Chris Meloni, of Law and Order fame)
Voiced this guy (Spike from Dinosaurs). There, now that's a thing you know. And shout out to the trivia podcast Good Job, Brain for bringing this tidbit to the world's attention.

item.dc:creator: Necridos

item.title: Quick update on Ms. Story of Frumperton
item.description:
Hey all, it's been a few days since this adorable lump had her dental surgery and I thought I'd pop in with an update on how she's doing. Short version is, pretty good so far! Long version is, pretty good so far but she's still sore and has been hanging pretty close to me whenever I'm not at work. ^_^ Still, she's recovering well and has rediscovered her voice and appetite. She has a cough because of the tracheostomy, but the vet says that'll clear up soon. At the end of the day, that's hardly anything to complain about!
Of course, she's immediately claimed the living room floor as her preferred spot for her big bed. I dare not move it lest I invoke her fuzzy wrath (seen here, moments before receiving a boop). She's all purrs and cuddles now.
And thanks to an anonymous Imgurian, her vet bill has been completely covered. I don't know who you are, but you're seriously an amazing person for doing it. Story appreciates it too, because some of that will certainly translate into fresh treats for her once her gums heal. <3 Thanks to all of you for always having kind things to say when I share this little kitty. I don't always break from the horse shtick, but when I do, it's for this little goblin.
item.dc:creator: ElbowDeepInAHorse
